title: Full-stack Developer Intern, K52 Experts, Mauritius, Calebasses
description: I implemented a support ticket system and designed the SQL Server database. I developed the backend using C#, ASP.NET, and SQL Server, along with the React frontend utilizing TypeScript, Material Design, React Query, and Zustand.

title: Fullstack Engineer, Solution Inc, South Africa, Johannesburg (Remote)
description: I implemented the backend in TypeScript using the Drizzle ORM, Redis for caching with the Turso database, and Resend for our application, Baxo, an instant messaging app. I developed the notification system based Expo Notifications and Redis Streams. Additionally, I worked on client-api interaction with React Query and the local sync engine on the React Native application using Expo SQLite and Drizzle. Implemented the client library as an npm package and updated it on the backend. Implemented Firestore functions for event management.

title: Oracle Netsuite Developer Intern, ITelligence Sys, Mauritius, Port-Louis
description: My team and I worked on implementing a POS using Xojo and Oracle Netsuite. My task consisted of designing the API used by the Xojo app to access data on Oracle Netsuite with JavaScript RESTlets, and implementing the client-side classes interacting with the API in Xojo.

title: Web Developer, AEES Services, DR Congo, Lubumbashi
description: I was responsible for creating a new website for the company Aees Services in Lubumbashi using Nuxt, Vue.js, and Prismic for the content.
